---
title: "Map of Ukraine (Colored)"
author: "Sydorenko Rostyslav"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: true
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(maps)

ukraine <- map_data("world", region = "Ukraine")

# --- build uabb: bbox rectangle + Ukraine holes, both with subgroup ---
xmin <- min(ukraine$long) - 1
xmax <- max(ukraine$long) + 1
ymin <- min(ukraine$lat)  - 1
ymax <- max(ukraine$lat)  + 1

bbox_df <- data.frame(
  long     = c(xmin, xmax, xmax, xmin),
  lat      = c(ymin, ymin, ymax, ymax),
  group    = "mask",
  subgroup = "bbox"
)

ukraine_holes <- ukraine |>
  select(long, lat, subgroup = group) |>
  mutate(subgroup = paste0("hole_", subgroup),
         group    = "mask")

uzhhorod <- data.frame(
  lon = 22.2877,
  lat = 48.6208,
  city = "Uzhhorog"
  )

kyiv <- data.frame(
  lon = 30.5234,
  lat = 50.4501,
  city = "Kyiv"
)

uabb <- bind_rows(bbox_df, ukraine_holes)

# --- flag midpoint (same bbox, no new variables needed) ---
flag_ymid <- (ymin + ymax) / 2

# --- plot ---
uaplot <- ggplot(uabb, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group, subgroup = subgroup)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax,
           ymin = flag_ymid, ymax = ymax, fill = "#0057B7") +
  annotate("rect", xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax,
           ymin = ymin,      ymax = flag_ymid, fill = "#FFD700") +
  geom_polygon(fill = "white") +
  coord_quickmap() +
  geom_point(data = uzhhorod, mapping = aes(x = lon, y = lat), colour = "red", size = 3, shape = 18, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = uzhhorod, mapping = aes(x = lon, y = lat, label = city),  vjust = 0.3, hjust = -0.05, nudge_x = 0.2, fontface = "bold", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_point(data = kyiv, mapping = aes(x = lon, y = lat), color = "green", size = 4, shape = 18, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = kyiv, aes(x = lon, y = lat, label = city), vjust = 0.3, hjust = -0.05, nudge_x = 0.2, fontface = "bold", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  ggtitle("Ukrainian Biological Data Science Summer School & My Hometowm",
          subtitle = "July 11 – 25, 2026") +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(color = "#0057B7", face = "bold", size = 13),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "black",   face = "bold", size = 11))

uaplot
```
